rulings.Case Title: WILLARD E BARTEL ET AL VS. MATSON NAVIGATION COMPANY, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 8, 2015 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiffs' motion for admission pro hac vice of John Herrick: hearing required. The hearing will be at 10:15a.m. Both sides must bring proposed orders to the hearing. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. = (503/TLJ)
